DEMO DATA COMPARE MODE
Status thresholds: Complete Actual date recorded On Track Planned date > today + 3 days At Risk Planned date within 3 days, no actual Delayed Planned date past today, no actual
Overview · This Week at a Glance
Burndown · Remaining Stage Tasks Over Time

Lesson Development Burndown

7,070 stage-task instances across 1,010 courses. The dashed ideal pace line shows linear burndown from project start to projected end. The solid line is current progress against plan; when actuals are wired in, an additional actual line will appear.

          Delivery Plan · "Deliver and SO" (LearningMate)

          Delivery Window

          When does the final "Deliver and SO" milestone happen for each course? These dates drive customer-facing rollout. The dashboard below shows the cadence, broken down by state, subject, grade group, and month.

          Each calendar cell shows the number of deliveries planned that day. Subject ratios are shown as a small stacked bar (Math, ELA, Science, Social Studies). Click any day with deliveries to see the full course list.

          Live forecast bucketed by week. Click any week to expand and see, per course, the LearningMate-owned milestones — Completed in Brightspot (M1), BSP Course Validation (M3), Green Lighting (M5), and Deliver and SO (M7) — with each milestone's effective date and current status. The right-edge status bar aggregates done/wip/yts across all four milestone cells for the courses in that week.

          Filters this widget only.
          Daily Calendars (effective date; +N/-N badges show shift from baseline)
          Calendar view:
          Stage:

          Each cell shows the number of courses whose selected milestone falls on that day (default M7 = Deliver and SO). A green border means all courses on that day have completed the selected milestone. An orange border means at least one course shifted FROM or TO that day vs the baseline plan for that milestone. The corner badge shows the net difference.

          Deliveries

          Distinct Course Rollup

          SEM A + SEM B for the same base course count as 1 distinct course. Full Year and Sem Only count as 1 each.

          Master vs Derivatives Rollup

          Master = original master course. 40% / 60% / 80% = state-specific derivatives. Distinct counts pair SEM A + SEM B as 1 production unit.

          Deliveries by Month
          Overdue starts. Lessons where Baseline Start has passed and Lesson Development hasn't begun. Last refreshed —. Click tab to load...
          Manual refresh: Click the button below to queue a fresh scan of all 28 trackers. Building the overdue list takes about ~5 minutes — the dashboard auto-updates when it's ready.
          Action Required · Overdue Starts (grouped by course, sorted by days overdue)

          Lessons where work should have begun by now. Yellow = 1-3 days overdue. Red = 4+ days overdue.

          —
          How RAG is computed
          • Green All milestones Done, OR on plan with no slipping (Course Drift ≤ 0 days)
          • Yellow At least one milestone In Progress, OR forecast slipping 1-3 days
          • Red At least one milestone Blocked or Fixes Required, OR Course Drift > 3 days
          • Gray No status entered yet on any milestone
          Live tracker data. Aggregated from 28 subject-grade tracker Google Sheets. Last refreshed —. Loading...

          Subject × Grade RAG Matrix

          Course RAG counts and drift across all 28 subject/grade trackers. Numbers in parentheses are courses drifting more than 3 days.

          Week-over-Week

          How key portfolio metrics moved compared to the snapshot from 7 days ago.

          Per-Course Gantt Timeline

          Each row shows a course's planned development window (M1 baseline to M7 baseline). Markers indicate the latest effective position (actual when Done, plan otherwise). The dashed red line is today.

          Slippage Distribution

          Histogram of course drift (days behind baseline). Green = on/ahead, yellow = mild slip, red = significant slip.

          Stage Bottleneck Indicator

          For each of the 10 workflow stages, share of lessons still in flight (Not Started + In Progress + Fixes Required + Blocked) relative to total touched. Highest in-flight ratio at the top.

          Top Movers

          RAG transitions and drift movements since the previous snapshot.

          Trends Over Time

          % Done, Red Courses, and Lessons Drifting across the last 30 daily snapshots.

          Drill Down

          Pick a Subject, Grade, and State to pull the live state-sheet data straight from Google Sheets. Use this when you want to inspect a single state's lessons without opening the actual sheet.

          Choose Subject → Grade → State, then click Load.

          Google Sheet Trackers

          All 28 lesson-development tracker spreadsheets, grouped by subject. Click a subject card to expand and reveal the seven grade-level trackers; click any tracker name to open it in a new browser tab. No more digging through Drive.

          28 trackers
          4 subjects
          7 grades each (Gr 3-8 + HS)

          Generated: · Filters: none

          Drill-down

          Manage Snapshots

          Snapshots are stored in your browser's localStorage (per-browser, per-machine). Use Export to share with a teammate; use Import to load a teammate's snapshot here. Up to 13 snapshots are kept.

            Simulate "today"

            Set the dashboard's reference date. All "is this complete / delayed / at risk" calculations use this value. Useful for showing leadership "what will status look like on July 1?"
